phases.name: Discussion
phases.instructions: Explore goals, constraints, options, non-goals, and decisions before formal specification.

completionCriteria.description: The user goal, constraints, accepted decisions, and open questions are captured.

phases.name: Specify
phases.instructions: Convert the discussion outcome into planning-ready requirements and acceptance criteria.

completionCriteria.description: Requirements are explicit, testable, and ready for planning.

phases.name: Plan
phases.instructions: Design the implementation approach, ownership boundaries, data contracts, risks, and validation strategy.

completionCriteria.description: The technical plan names affected surfaces, risks, and verification routes.

phases.name: Tasks
phases.instructions: Break the approved plan into dependency-aware implementation tasks with write scopes and validation.

completionCriteria.description: Tasks are independently executable, scoped, and ordered.

phases.name: Implement
phases.instructions: Execute the approved tasks with tests, validation evidence, and scoped handoff.

completionCriteria.description: Implementation work is complete with changed files, validation evidence, and remaining risk recorded.
